message:
test(security): add HPACK table capping and improve invariant coverage

HPACK improvements:
- Add test for dynamic table size capping to prevent memory exhaustion
  attacks via malicious SETTINGS_HEADER_TABLE_SIZE values
- Verify encoder respects configured maximum regardless of peer signals

Security invariant test additions:
- CONTINUATION timeout validation (non-zero, reasonable upper bound)
- HPACK roundtrip encoding/decoding verification
- HPACK empty input handling
- WebSocket close reason parsing for valid payloads
- Stress tests (ignored by default) for malformed HPACK input,
  various WebSocket frame sizes, and settings edge cases

These tests ensure security-critical boundaries are maintained across
the HTTP/2 and WebSocket implementations, catching regressions in
resource limit enforcement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
